SEO.title: SteuerHelper | Freelance Tax Calculator Germany
SEO.description: Calculate your real Net Income. Accurate calculation of income tax, health insurance (GKV/PKV), and pension for freelancers in Germany for 2026.

Footer.disclaimer: This calculator provides estimates only. Please consult a certified tax advisor (Steuerberater) for your official tax declaration.
